title: Log in and access protected backend routes
description: This test verifies that a valid authenticated session can access protected backend routes and reach the authorized admin users view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the admin users page
Verify authorized admin users content is displayed
Verify the user is on a protected authenticated view

title: Non-admin user cannot access the admin dashboard
description: A candidate or employer is blocked from the admin dashboard and no platform-wide metrics are returned.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the candidate or employer credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the admin dashboard
Verify an access denied state is visible
Verify platform-wide metrics are not displayed

title: Block access with invalid credentials
description: This test verifies that invalid login credentials are rejected and protected admin access remains unavailable.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with a wrong password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is visible
Attempt to open the admin users page
Verify protected admin content is not displayed

title: Candidate cannot view another user's application details
description: A candidate is prevented from opening another user's application details and no private application data is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the candidate credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the candidate application list
Open an application that does not belong to the current candidate
Verify private application data is not displayed
Verify an access error or not found state is visible

title: Admin manages users and subscriptions
description: An admin can open the user and subscription management views and see the expected administrative lists.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the admin credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the users admin page
Navigate to the subscriptions admin page
Verify the user list is displayed
Verify subscription data is displayed

title: Admin sees the platform dashboard
description: An admin can open the admin dashboard and see platform-level metrics without tenant-specific leakage.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the admin credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the admin dashboard
Verify platform metrics are displayed
Verify tenant-specific data is not displayed

title: Reject malformed login submissions
description: This test verifies that missing or malformed login input is rejected without creating an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form without entering credentials
Verify validation errors are visible
Verify no authenticated session is established

title: Create a candidate profile and view it back
description: This test verifies that a new candidate profile can be created and then retrieved in the authenticated profile view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile creation flow
Fill in the required candidate profile details
Save the profile
Verify the profile is displayed after saving
Verify the profile content is available in the authenticated view

title: Candidate submits an application to an active job
description: A candidate can apply to an active job and then see the submitted application reflected in their application view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the candidate credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the jobs page
Open an active job listing
Submit a job application
Verify the application is created and visible in the candidate's application view

title: Create a job and see it in the listings
description: This test verifies that an employer can create a job and then see the new listing in the jobs index.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the job creation flow
Fill in the required job details
Save the job
Open the jobs listing
Verify the newly created job is displayed
Verify active jobs are listed

title: Employer reviews applicants for their own job
description: An employer can open applicant review for one of their jobs and see only the applicants associated with that job.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employer credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the employer jobs page
Open one of the employer's jobs
Open the applicant review view
Verify the applicant list for that job is displayed

title: Prevent a candidate from creating a job
description: This test verifies that a candidate user cannot create a job and is shown an authorization failure.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the job creation flow
Fill in the required job details
Save the job
Verify an authorization error is visible
Verify no job is created

title: Employer updates an applicant decision for their own job
description: An employer can accept or reject an applicant for one of their jobs and see the updated decision reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employer credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the employer jobs page
Open one of the employer's jobs
Open the applicant review view
Update an applicant decision
Verify the application status is updated

title: Candidate sees a scoped dashboard with saved jobs and applications
description: A candidate can open their dashboard and see only their own saved jobs, applications, and metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the candidate credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the candidate dashboard
Verify candidate dashboard metrics are displayed
Verify saved jobs and applications are displayed

title: Employer sees an employer-specific dashboard
description: An employer can open their dashboard and see only employer-specific jobs, applicants, and activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the employer credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the employer dashboard
Verify employer dashboard metrics are displayed
Verify employer jobs and applicant activity are displayed

title: Reject incomplete or invalid job details
description: This test verifies that missing required job fields or invalid enum values prevent a job from being saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the job creation flow
Leave a required job field blank or choose an invalid option
Save the job
Verify a job validation error is visible
Verify no job is stored

title: Admin upgrades a user subscription
description: An admin can upgrade a user's subscription and see the updated plan reflected in the subscriptions view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the admin credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the subscriptions admin page
Upgrade a user's subscription plan
Verify the updated subscription plan is displayed

title: Prevent duplicate or invalid profile registration
description: This test verifies that duplicate email and invalid role or email input are rejected during profile registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile creation flow
Fill in a duplicate email or invalid profile value
Save the profile
Verify a profile validation error is visible
Verify no new profile is created

title: Admin creates a published article
description: An admin can create a new article and then see it listed in the article management view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the admin credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the articles admin page
Create a new article with valid content
Verify the new article is listed

title: Admin creates a published article and a visitor can read it
description: This verifies that an admin can create a published article and that a public visitor can read the article by slug afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/articles
Create a new published article with a unique slug, title, and body content
Navigate to the public blog page for the new article slug
Verify the published article content is displayed
Verify the article title is displayed

title: Prevent editing another employer's job
description: This test verifies that an employer cannot modify a job they do not own and the original job remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a job owned by another employer
Attempt to edit the job details
Save the job
Verify an ownership error is visible
Verify the job remains unchanged

title: Candidate cannot submit the same application twice
description: A candidate cannot create a duplicate application for the same job and the existing application remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the candidate credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the jobs page
Open an active job listing
Submit a job application
Submit the same job application again
Verify a duplicate application warning is visible
Verify the original application remains visible

title: Public visitor reads a published article by slug
description: This verifies that a public visitor can open a published article page by slug and see the article content.

steps.description: Navigate to a public blog article page with a valid published slug
Verify the article content is displayed
Verify the article title is displayed

title: Block unauthorized profile field changes
description: This test verifies that attempts to change restricted profile fields or escalate roles are rejected and the saved profile remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the profile edit flow
Change a restricted profile field or attempt to change the role
Save the profile
Verify a permission or validation error is visible
Verify the existing profile data remains unchanged

title: Admin sees a created article in the articles list
description: This verifies that an admin can confirm a newly created article appears in the admin articles list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/articles
Create a new published article with a unique slug, title, and body content
Return to the articles list view
Verify the newly created article is listed
Verify the article is shown as published

title: Admin can create another published article after returning to the list
description: This verifies that an admin can complete the article creation flow and continue managing articles from the list view.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/articles
Create a new published article with a unique slug, title, and body content
Return to the articles list view
Start creating another article
Verify the article creation form is available
Verify the previously created article remains accessible in the list

title: Admin cannot create an article with missing required fields
description: An admin sees validation feedback when attempting to create an article without the required title and no article is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the admin credentials and submit the login form
Navigate to the articles admin page
Start creating a new article without a title
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify no new article appears in the list

title: Public visitor cannot access unpublished article content
description: This verifies that unpublished article content is not available to public visitors through the blog page.

steps.description: Navigate to a public blog article page for an unpublished slug
Verify a not found page is displayed
Verify unpublished article content is not displayed

title: Public visitor cannot open an unknown article slug
description: A public visitor sees a not found state when trying to open an unknown blog article slug.

steps.description: Navigate to an unknown blog article page
Verify a not found state is visible

title: Public visitor sees a not found page for an unknown article slug
description: This verifies that an unknown blog slug shows a not found state instead of article content.

steps.description: Navigate to a public blog article page with an unknown slug
Verify a not found page is displayed
Verify article content is not displayed
